elJuego.title: The Game
elJuego.subtitle: Discover everything about the most exciting laser tag experience

whatIs.title: What is Laser Tag?
whatIs.content:
Laser tag is an action game in which participants compete in teams, using electronic guns that emit completely harmless infrared beams. Each player wears a vest or sensor that records hits, allowing them to accumulate points and follow the game in real time. Unlike other combat games, laser tag is safe, with no physical projectiles, no pain and suitable for all ages. 
It is based on strategy, speed and teamwork, making it perfect for both those seeking an adrenaline rush and those who simply want to have a fun time with friends, family or work colleagues. 
In short: it's like stepping into a video game, but in real life.

howWorks.title: How it works
howWorks.content: Each player receives a vest with sensors and a phaser. The goal is to tag players from the opposing team while avoiding being tagged yourself.

rules.title: Game Rules
rules.content: The rules are simple: respect all players, no running or physical contact, handle equipment with care, follow staff instructions, and above all, have fun!

important.title: Important Information
important.content: Minimum age: 6 years. Groups of 4 to 30 players. Game duration: 10-15 minutes. Equipment included. Comfortable clothing recommended.

elJuego.ctaDesc: Book your game now and experience the thrill of laser tag with friends, family, or colleagues.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our laser tag arena.
faq.notFoundText: Our team is here to assist you with any further questions you may have.

questions.a:
Laser tag is an action and strategy game in which players face off using laser guns and vests with sensors. 
The objective is to score points by hitting your opponents' sensors with the laser, without physical contact.

The minimum age is 10 years old. 
Children under 15 must be accompanied by an adult upon arrival, although the adult does not need to stay during the game session. 
The game is designed for ages 10 to 70. 
Adults and children can play together in the same session. 
For the purposes of the game, we consider adults to be anyone over the age of 15.

Absolutely! The game is completely harmless. 
The game is based on infrared sensors that are registered by the vests

questions.q: Should I wear any particular type of clothing?
questions.a:
To play laser tag, we recommend wearing comfortable, sporty clothing that allows you to move easily. 
It is best to avoid very loose clothing, skirts, dresses or open-toed shoes. We also advise against wearing loose items such as necklaces, hats or bags. 
In short: come comfortable, ready to run... and have fun!

questions.q: How many people can play simultaneously?
questions.a:
The maximum number of people who can play simultaneously is 20.  
For larger groups, please contact us. We have various options and formats with special game sessions for more people, holding small team tournaments.

questions.q: How long does a game last?
Can we play if there are fewer than the required number of players, for example, 2 or 3 people?
questions.a:
Yes, two or three people can play laser tag without any problem. 
However, you must sign up for sessions that still have places available, as games are completed with other players. 
Our booking system makes it easy to see how many places are left in each session, so you can choose the one that suits you best before confirming your booking.

questions.q: Can anyone else join the team at the last minute?
questions.a: Of course, as long as the maximum number of players allowed in that session is not exceeded.

questions.q: What if someone drops out at the last minute?
questions.a: No problem, the game will continue. Please note that the amount paid by the missing player will not be refunded, and their place will remain empty.

questions.q: Can I change my booking date or time?
questions.a:
Of course, our system allows you to modify your booking online from the booking confirmation you received. As long as you do so at least 48 hours in advance, you can modify it (change the date, number of people or even cancel) at no cost. The refund will be processed automatically. 
You can also do this at least 48 hours in advance by contacting our customer service department at lasertagmarbella@gmail.com or by calling +34 659 000 000

questions.q: How far in advance is it recommended to arrive?
questions.a: You must arrive 15 minutes before your booking time.

questions.q: What happens if I am late?
questions.a:
If you arrive more than 5 minutes late, the session may be cancelled, forfeiting the right to a refund for those who missed it. 
If the group that DID attend is more than 4 people, the game will continue without the missing people. A game will only be cancelled if the resulting group has fewer than 4 people. 
In this case, those who did attend but were unable to play will be entitled to a refund or to change the time and day of their game, if they so wish.

questions.q: How do I make a booking?
How do I pay if I have booked by telephone?
What happens if I do not pay for a booking made by telephone?
Can the room be locked for my group only?

questions.a:
It is possible to modify a booking, provided that this is done 48 hours in advance, in which case the corresponding refund will be made. 
Our system allows you to modify your booking from the booking confirmation you received, completely automatically and online.

questions.q: May I bring food or drink onto the premises?
